title: Application Startup & Initialization
platform_entry_points: Desktop: DesktopLauncher.main(String[] arg) → static entry point
desktop_startup_flow: a. Discord: DiscordRPC.connect(discordID) on daemon thread (if not disabled)
c. initSteam: SVars.net, SVars.stats, SVars.workshop, SVars.user initialized
d. Register ClientLoadEvent listener for Steam player name + lobby connect
8. new SdlApplication(DesktopLauncher, SdlConfig) — creates SDL window
android_startup_flow: 2. Set default uncaught exception handler → CrashHandler.log()
9. Migrate files from internal to external storage if not yet done
ios_startup_flow: 5. Device idiom check → Scl.setAddition(±0.5f) for iPad/iPhone
7. didFinishLaunching() — check for URL launch options
8. Register ClientLoadEvent → add landscape-rotation warning overlay
client_launcher_init_flow: ClientLauncher.init() [called by framework after GL context created]
client_launcher_setup_flow: 1. Check MINDUSTRY_DATA_DIR env/property → set data directory if present
2. Vars.checkLaunch() — read launchIDFile, set failedToLaunch flag, write new launch ID
4. new LoadRenderer() — create loading screen renderer
6. Vars.loadFileLogger() — init file logger to last_log.txt
9. IntelGpuCheck.init() — detect Intel GPU, disable GL3 if needed
10. Log GL version, max texture size, RAM info
16. Register async Sound loader (loads via mainExecutor)
17. Register async Music loader (loads via mainExecutor)
25. assets.load(new Vars()) — async load game variables/content registry
27. [BRANCH] maxTextureSize >= 4096 → load sprites.aatls ELSE load fallback/sprites.aatls
[Each Loadable module is also queued via assets.load(l)]
asset_loading_loop: ClientLauncher.update() called every frame during loading:
→ loader.draw() — render loading screen at max 20 FPS
[FPS cap] sleep until nextFrame if limitFps
key_events_fired: ClientCreateEvent — fired at start of setup(), before asset loading
ClientLoadEvent — fired when all assets loaded and modules initialized
key_conditions_branches: Desktop: Intel GPU detected → disable GL3, use GL 2.x
Desktop: 32-bit Windows → show error dialog, abort
Desktop: Java < 17 → show error dialog, abort
Android: SDK >= Q → use Intent.ACTION_OPEN_DOCUMENT for file picker
Android: files_moved marker absent → migrate files to external storage
ClientLauncher: maxTextureSize < 4096 → use fallback sprite atlas
ClientLauncher: Intel GPU + no GL3 → log warning only
Mobile pause → call finishLaunch() (unreliable exit event workaround)
key_dependencies: ClientLauncher depends_on AssetManager (all async asset loading)
ClientLauncher depends_on content (createBaseContent, createModContent, init, load)
ClientLauncher instantiates: Logic, Control, Renderer, UI, NetServer, NetClient
DesktopLauncher depends_on SVars (Steam: net, stats, workshop, user)
AndroidLauncher depends_on DexClassLoader (mod JAR loading on Android)
important_notes: All platforms converge at ClientLauncher.init() → setup(). Asset loading is async via AssetManager; UI is blocked behind a LoadRenderer until complete. 'finished' flag gates normal game-loop vs loading-loop. finishLaunch() deletes launchIDFile to mark successful boot. Steam+Discord init is Desktop-only and happens before SdlApplication creation.
